sections.title: Executive Summary
sections.takeaway: Stabilize the handoff between Final Drill Assembly and Functional Test first. Clear downstream WIP before releasing more work, and rebalance labor by queue pressure instead of fixed headcount.

sections.title: System Diagnosis
sections.takeaway: Final Drill Assembly is not failing in isolation. Functional Test is also congested, so downstream WIP is not clearing fast enough and the blockage propagates back upstream.

actions.title: Stabilize the active constraint first
actions.why: Stabilize the handoff between Final Drill Assembly and Functional Test first. Clear downstream WIP before releasing more work, and rebalance labor by queue pressure instead of fixed headcount.
actions.effect: Expected immediate gain is about 0.34 units/hr if the bottleneck mechanism is removed.

actions.title: Run the first improvement event at Final Drill Assembly
actions.why: When coverage or role balance slips at Final Drill Assembly, effective service rate drops below arrivals. Queue delay rises to 176.3 min and WIP builds to 2.2 units, so Final Drill Assembly stays pinned as the system bottleneck.
actions.effect: Likely leverage: 37.7 min less queue delay and 20.2 min less lead time.

actions.title: Put release and WIP discipline around the largest queue
actions.why: Housing Kit Prep is carrying the heaviest queue and is driving system-level delay.
actions.effect: Reduces hidden delay and prevents the line from flooding the next near-constraint.

actions.title: Separate data validation from action execution
actions.why: Set the real number of operating shifts for this line.
actions.effect: Improves trust in the recommendation without delaying immediate containment work.

actions.title: Attack structural waiting at Housing Kit Prep
actions.why: Housing Kit Prep is contributing the largest delay pocket in the current modeled path.
actions.effect: Separates touch time from waiting so the team works on real delay instead of anecdotal friction.
